subject: VNFSDK - revert back to embedded postgres
commit_message:
VNFSDK - revert back to embedded postgres

Change-Id: Iae0e6953175769730d5afc52409a354f5f0b3bf1
Issue-ID: OOM-751
Signed-off-by: jasmineWen <jasmine.wen@amdocs.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

This one related to its health check. Please merge it.

Patch Set 2:

Hi Borislav,  Your comments are all adopted except for the service name one. vnfsdk uses environment variable POSTGRES_SERVICE_HOST connecting to database, service name change will need change in vnfsdk image accordingly. I'll leave it for now.

Patch Set 2:

> Hi Borislav,  Your comments are all adopted except for the service
 > name one. vnfsdk uses environment variable POSTGRES_SERVICE_HOST
 > connecting to database, service name change will need change in
 > vnfsdk image accordingly. I'll leave it for now.

When you say environment variable, can it be passed to the container?

Patch Set 2:

POSTGRES_SERVICE_HOST is a environment variable shows up in pod dev-vnfsdk automatically, kubernetes did this work.

Patch Set 2:

> POSTGRES_SERVICE_HOST is a environment variable shows up in pod
 > dev-vnfsdk automatically, kubernetes did this work.

Could you try to pass it to the container with value vnfsdk-postgres?

Patch Set 2:

Yes we could do so by changing the service name from postgres to vnfsdk-postgres, which will require vnfsdk image being changed accordingly.  This service name will be changed when switching to common postgres DB in cassablanca release, would it be better leaving it till then?

Patch Set 2:

If you change POSTGRES_SERVICE_HOST, we need to make 3 changes inside VNFSDK to match.  SInce it's late in the release, I'd prefer we leave POSTGRES_SERVICE_HOST and re-evaluate in Casablanca.

Patch Set 3:

> Uploaded patch set 3.

testing

Patch Set 3:

Update the service name to vnfsdk-postgres, and define an environment variable POSTGRES_SERVICE_HOST in vnfsdk pod, to reference VNFSDK_POSTGRES_SERVICE_HOST. 
Thanks Borislav!
